summary: Iter-2 design complete. 3 stories classified (2 EXTEND, 1 NEW). 4 screens designed across 3 mockup files + shared styles.css baseline. All 10 l10n keys mapped. 4 ResultState branches for RiderProfilePage. Filter badge, conditional clear button, and filtered empty state fully specified.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: design.md, styles.css, 3 mockup HTML files, and design.json all present.

qualityGates.name: design_coverage_complete
qualityGates.notes: All 3 stories have full state coverage: US-2-1 (no-filters, active-badge, filtered-empty), US-2-2 (conditional clear button), US-2-3 (attendee-tap, loading-shimmer, data-vehicles, data-no-vehicles, error). 0 uncovered acceptance criteria.

qualityGates.name: dark_theme_tokens_applied
qualityGates.notes: All mockups use bg=#111111, primary=#f98c1f, Space Grotesk font, radius=8px from styles.css design tokens.

qualityGates.name: l10n_keys_mapped
qualityGates.notes: All 10 l10n keys (7 event_filter* + 3 rider_*) mapped to Spanish sentence-case copy in design.md and mockups.

qualityGates.name: no_edit_affordances_in_rider_profile
qualityGates.notes: RiderProfilePage data state explicitly read-only; no edit, delete, or set-main-vehicle buttons present in any mockup frame.

qualityGates.name: adr3_brownfield_compliance
qualityGates.notes: Design notes ADR-3 impact: badge count derived from EventFilters plain class (hasFilters + individual checks), not from a new EventsState freezed field.
